% FROZEN COMPANION MIRROR — DO NOT EDIT
% =============================================================================
% Canonical working source: private authoring repository
% Source document:         styles/paper-preprint.tex
% Mirror sync:             2026-04-11
% Mirror type:             Frozen companion mirror
%
% This file records the LaTeX header used to render the frozen Paper 5 mirror
% PDF in this public repository. The public mirror is read-only by convention
% and by CODEOWNERS protection. Future authoring revisions do not retroactively
% modify this copy; public changes require an explicit re-sync.
%
% See ./README.md for full mirror policy.
% =============================================================================

\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{ragged2e}
\usepackage{etoolbox}
\usepackage{caption}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{setspace}
\usepackage{newunicodechar}

\newunicodechar{✓}{$\checkmark$}
\newunicodechar{∈}{$\in$}
\newunicodechar{∃}{$\exists$}
\newunicodechar{≠}{$\neq$}
\newunicodechar{≤}{$\le$}
\newunicodechar{≥}{$\ge$}
\newunicodechar{≈}{$\approx$}
\newunicodechar{∩}{$\cap$}
\newunicodechar{→}{$\rightarrow$}
\newunicodechar{₁}{$_1$}
\newunicodechar{₂}{$_2$}
\newunicodechar{ₖ}{$_k$}

\setstretch{1.03}
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{0.45em}
\setlength{\emergencystretch}{3em}

\titleformat{\section}{\Large\bfseries}{\thesection.}{0.6em}{}
\titleformat{\subsection}{\large\bfseries}{\thesubsection.}{0.6em}{}
\titleformat{\subsubsection}{\normalsize\bfseries}{\thesubsubsection.}{0.6em}{}

\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.4em}{0.6em}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{1.1em}{0.4em}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{0.8em}{0.3em}

\setlength{\LTpre}{0.35em}
\setlength{\LTpost}{0.35em}
\setlength{\LTleft}{0pt}
\setlength{\LTright}{0pt}
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{4pt}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.08}
\AtBeginEnvironment{longtable}{\small}
\newcolumntype{L}[1]{>{\RaggedRight\arraybackslash}p{#1}}
\newcolumntype{C}[1]{>{\Centering\arraybackslash}p{#1}}
\newcolumntype{R}[1]{>{\RaggedLeft\arraybackslash}p{#1}}

\captionsetup[table]{skip=4pt}
\captionsetup[figure]{skip=4pt}

\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
\setlength{\headheight}{14pt}

\newcommand{\codeid}[1]{{\small\begingroup\urlstyle{tt}\nolinkurl{#1}\endgroup}}
